title: 🧪 FAANG Interview Question- Two Pointers Problem
content:
```python
## Implementation of two pointer approach
## Time Complexity -> O(n)
## function definition
def findPair(arr, target):
    l = 0
    r = len(arr) - 1
    for i in range(len(arr)-1):
        if arr[l] + arr[r] == target:
            return l,r
        elif arr[l] + arr[r] > target:
            r = r - 1
        else:
            l = l + 1
    return -1,-1

## Driver code
arr = [20, 40, 50, 75, 120, 145, 200]
target = 60
## function calling
result = findPair(arr, target)
print(result)
```
